MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ACQUITY REALTY, INC., INSIGHT RAIL YARD LLC, CARLYSLE STREET PARTNERS LLC, STEPHEN PAHL, EUGENE BUICK, GERSON BERS, JOHN PRINGLE, DENNIS RANDALL, AND KARIM ALLANA'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

Appearances:
David Lerch of O'Hagan Meyer (650.218.9416, dlerch@ohaganmeyer.com) for defendants and moving parties; No other appearances.

This matter is called at 9:05 am. There are no other appearances. The court hears arguments on behalf of the defendants.

Arguments having concluded, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. Defendants Acquity Realty Inc. et al. contend that plaintiff Gregory Ovalle's FEHA claim (sixth cause of action) is unexhausted and his Tameny claim (seventh cause of action) is barred by the two-year limitations period. The court grants leave to amend the sixth cause of action. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
